# viettelidc_vks_backup_record (Data Source)

Data source to get detail of a VKS manual backup record.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (Number) ID of the host.
- `id` (String) The ID of the manual backup record.

### Optional

- `plan_type` (String) Plan type, default is 'k8s'.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `size` (Number)
- `status` (String)
- `volume_id` (String)
- `volume_name` (String)
- `volume_size` (Number)
